questions.question: Describe the fundamental difference between a virtual clock and a physical clock in the context of distributed systems. (8 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the implications of clock desynchronization on consistency and correctness

questions.question: Suppose a distributed system has multiple nodes with physical clocks that drift at different rates. How would you propose to synchronize these physical clocks? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the trade-offs between achieving absolute timekeeping and managing communication overhead

questions.question: An algorithm for synchronizing physical clocks in a distributed system is proposed using a three-way handshake. Describe the steps involved in this process and its potential benefits and drawbacks. (12 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the impact on system performance, latency, and the potential for clock skew
